title: Need vertical benchmark in Chart Widget
excerpt: Users need to be able to add vertical benchmark lines as well as horizontal in the Charts Widget.  I create charts where the X-axis is time based and it would help to be able to insert benchmarks along the timeline.

posts.author: CASA (Steve Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Users need to be able to add vertical benchmark lines as well as horizontal in the Charts Widget. I create charts where the X-axis is time based and it would help to be able to insert benchmarks along the timeline.
